name: I2C LCD Adapter Module (PCF8574)
potentiometer_function: Adjusts LCD contrast (replaces the need for an external potentiometer on VEE)

pins.sda: I2C Data line (connect to Arduino SDA / A4)
pins.scl: I2C Clock line (connect to Arduino SCL / A5)

connection_note: This module is NOT pre-soldered to the LCD. Solder the 16-pin header to the LCD first, then plug the adapter onto the LCD pins. Alternatively, connect via mini breadboard jumper wires.
description: PCF8574-based I2C backpack for 16x2/20x4 LCD displays. Reduces 16-pin LCD wiring to just 4 wires (GND, VCC, SDA, SCL). Has onboard potentiometer for contrast adjustment. Not pre-soldered with LCD — must be connected manually.
